source_routes.label: CRO bulk-data customer extract
source_routes.use: Join director appointments to CRO company numbers, derive active-director age thresholds if date-of-birth or age metadata is included in the approved extract.
source_routes.notes: CRO states that bulk data is supplied to customers through a secure location using individual login credentials.

source_routes.label: CORE account-holder company printout / appointment download
source_routes.use: Validate director/officer identities for priority companies when bulk export is unavailable.
source_routes.notes: CORE search supports viewing company data by name or number; document and appointment detail may require account workflows.

source_routes.label: CRO Open Data Company Records
source_routes.use: Keep company counts, status, geography, and sector evidence current.
source_routes.notes: This route does not supply the director-age threshold fields required for approved company-universe rows.

next_actions: Obtain a director-level CRO/CORE/bulk export keyed by company number for the 108 request rows.
Preflight the director-level export with `scripts/validate_director_export.py --strict` before aggregation.
Join the director-level export to the existing CRO company-count evidence by company number and active appointment status.
Aggregate active companies by county, local area, and sector into director_50_plus through director_70_plus threshold counts.
Validate the completed import with `scripts/validate_director_age_import.py --strict` before merging.
Merge only rows with complete threshold counts and approval metadata into the approved company-universe CSV.
public_note: The public site can show observed market breadth today, but the approved company-universe gate remains open until director-age threshold counts are supplied by an approved director-level source.
